product_overview: E-Konsul is a Laravel-based CRM for managing consultations (leads), notes, reminders, multi-account user hierarchies, and analytics to support follow-ups and decision making. It centralizes consultation lifecycle, master data, import/export, audit trails, and operational reports for Admin and Super Admin roles.
core_goals: Enable tracking and lifecycle management of consultations (leads) including notes and reminders.
Provide role- and account-scoped access (Super Admin vs Account Admin) to secure data visibility and actions.
Support bulk data operations (CSV import/export) and audit trails for enterprise compliance.
Deliver operational dashboards and analytics for decision making and team performance monitoring.
Expose a clear HTTP API surface for UI interactions and polling notifications with appropriate throttling and permissions.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Session-based login and logout to establish user identity and permissions for subsequent API calls.
user_flows: GET /login -> Receive 200 with login form -> POST /login with valid credentials -> Receive 302 redirect to /dashboard and session cookie -> GET /consultations with session cookie -> Receive 200 with consultations list
POST /login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 with authentication error

features.name: Consultation Management
features.description: Create, read (list), update, delete consultations and bulk import via CSV to manage leads and their lifecycle.
user_flows: POST /consultations with valid auth and payload -> Receive 201 with created consultation ID -> GET /consultations with auth -> Receive 200 with list including created consultation
POST /consultations with missing required fields -> Receive 422 with validation errors
PUT /consultations/{consultation} with auth and updates -> Receive 200 with updated consultation -> GET /consultations with auth -> Receive 200 showing updated data
PUT /consultations/{nonexistent} with auth -> Receive 404 not found
DELETE /consultations/{consultation} with auth -> Receive 204 no content -> GET /consultations with auth -> Receive 200 without deleted item
DELETE /consultations/{consultation} with insufficient permissions -> Receive 403 forbidden
POST /consultations/import with auth and CSV file -> Receive 200 with import summary (rows processed, errors) -> GET /consultations with auth -> Receive 200 showing imported consultations
POST /consultations/import with malformed CSV -> Receive 400/422 with import error details

features.name: Consultation Notes & Reminders
features.description: Attach timeline notes and follow-up reminders to consultations so staff can record interactions and schedule actions.
user_flows: POST /consultations/{consultation}/notes with auth and note payload -> Receive 201 with note ID -> GET /consultations/{consultation}/notes with auth -> Receive 200 list including new note
POST /consultations/{nonexistent}/notes with auth -> Receive 404 not found

POST /consultations/{consultation}/reminders with auth and future scheduled_at -> Receive 201 with reminder ID -> GET /consultations/{consultation}/reminders with auth -> Receive 200 list including reminder
POST /consultations/{consultation}/reminders with auth and scheduled_at in the past -> Receive 422 validation error

features.name: Master Data Management
features.description: Super Admin management console for categories, statuses, regions, and user administration to control system master data.
user_flows: GET /master-data with super-admin auth -> Receive 200 with master data dashboard (categories, statuses, regions)
POST /master-data/users with super-admin auth and valid user payload -> Receive 201 with created user ID
POST /master-data/users with duplicate email -> Receive 422 with validation error
GET /master-data with non-super-admin auth -> Receive 403 forbidden

features.name: Accounts Management
features.description: List and manage Accounts (groups) that are assigned to users; controls what consultations a user can see based on assigned accounts.
user_flows: GET /accounts with super-admin auth -> Receive 200 with accounts list
GET /accounts with account-admin auth -> Receive 200 with accounts scoped to the admin's assignments
GET /accounts with unauthorized user -> Receive 403 forbidden

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Provide dashboard and analytics endpoints for conversion metrics, productivity by account, and consultation distributions.
user_flows: GET /analytics with auth -> Receive 200 with aggregated analytics data and charts payload
GET /analytics with insufficient permissions -> Receive 403 forbidden

features.name: Audit Trail (Audit Logs)
features.description: Expose audit history for consultations to show who changed what, when, and previous values for compliance and debugging.
user_flows: GET /consultations/{consultation}/audits with auth -> Receive 200 with ordered audit records
GET /consultations/{consultation}/audits with auth but without permission -> Receive 403 forbidden
GET /audits with super-admin auth -> Receive 200 with global audit stream (paginated)

features.name: Import / Export CSV
features.description: Support bulk import of consultations via CSV and export of consultation lists for offline reporting.
user_flows: POST /consultations/import with auth and CSV -> Receive 200 with import summary including errors -> GET /consultations with auth -> Receive 200 showing imported rows
POST /consultations/import with invalid CSV template -> Receive 400/422 with template mismatch errors
GET /consultations/export with auth -> Receive 200 with CSV file download
GET /consultations/export without auth -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Notifications Polling
features.description: A throttled polling endpoint that returns pending notifications such as due reminders or new consultation notes.
user_flows: GET /notifications/poll with auth -> Receive 200 with notifications payload (due reminders, new notes)
GET /notifications/poll too frequently -> Receive 429 too many requests (throttled)
GET /notifications/poll without auth -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Attendance / Report Presence
features.description: Record and report user attendance or operational presence for auditing and operational metrics.
user_flows: POST /attendance with auth and payload (user_id, date, status) -> Receive 201 with attendance record ID -> GET /attendance with auth and filters -> Receive 200 with attendance records
POST /attendance with missing fields -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /attendance with insufficient permissions -> Receive 403 forbidden

features.name: Consultation Management
features.description: CRUD operations for consultations (leads) and importing

features.name: Master Data Management
features.description: Super admin management of categories, statuses, and users

features.name: Accounts Management
features.description: Super admin management of accounts assigned to users
